azureApiAgentPlaceholder: This value can be found in the 'Keys and Endpoints' section when checking resources in the Azure portal
azureApiVersionPlaceholder: Azure API version, following the YYYY-MM-DD format
deleteModelDesc: The model is not used by any AI assistant/subprocess/tool, do you confirm deletion?
deleteModelDesc2: The {{name}} model may affect AI assistants, subprocesses, and tools that have called this model, please proceed with caution
deleteModelDesc3: To ensure data security, if you need to {{operate}}, please enter {{name}} below to confirm

form.aliasPlaceholder: Please enter the provider alias, used to distinguish between multiple identical providers
form.cacheHitPriceDesc: The cost of reading content from the cache
form.cacheWritePriceDesc: The cost of writing content to the cache
form.creativeTemperatureDesc: Control the randomness of model responses, 0-1, the higher the more creative, fixed temperature will limit the model to use the specified temperature
form.inputPriceDesc: The cost of processing user input content
form.languageModelDesc: Cannot be modified after creation. When there are multiple identical large language models, the system will automatically match the highly available large model
form.languageModelPlaceholder: Please select a large language model, e.g., gpt-4o
form.loadWeightDesc: When multiple models have the same identifier, the system will allocate requests based on the weight, and to avoid overloading high-weight access points, a smooth weighted round-robin method will be used to allocate requests
form.loadWeightPlaceholder: Please enter the load weight, range 0-100
form.maxContextDesc: Set the maximum number of Tokens supported by the model
form.maxContextPlaceholder: Please enter the maximum number of Tokens supported by the model, e.g., 128000, etc.
form.maxOutPutContextDesc: Set the maximum number of Tokens supported by the model
form.maxOutPutContextPlaceholder: Please enter the maximum number of Tokens supported by the model, e.g., 128000, etc.
form.modelDisplayIconPlaceholder: Please select a model display icon
form.modelDisplayNamePlaceholder: Please enter the display name of the model, e.g., GPT-4, etc.
form.modelIdPlaceholder: Please select a model identifier, e.g., gpt-4o
form.modelNameDesc: This field will be used as the model ID when sending requests
form.modelNamePlaceholder: Please enter the actual deployment name or ID of the model
form.outputPriceDesc: The cost of generating model responses
form.packageAvailabilityDesc: When not bound to any package, all packages can use this model
form.packageAvailabilityPlaceholder: Please select the available package to bind
form.pleaseInputEmail: Please enter a valid email address
form.pleaseUpdateEnglishDescription: Model description versions are inconsistent across languages, synchronization is recommended
form.pleaseUpdateEnglishName: Model display name versions are inconsistent across languages, synchronization is recommended
form.privateKeyDesc: Complete private key containing -----BEGIN PRIVATE KEY-----
form.serviceProviderDesc: After creation, the provider cannot be modified
form.sortDesc: Used to control the display position in the provider list
form.sortPlaceholder: Please enter the display priority, the larger the value, the higher the display priority
form.superMagicDesc: Whether it supports super magic depends entirely on the model itself. Please test whether this model has available super magic capabilities yourself
form.supportThinkDesc: Whether it supports deep thinking depends entirely on the model itself. Please test whether this model has available deep thinking capabilities yourself
form.supportToolDesc: Whether it truly supports using tools depends entirely on the model itself. Please test the tool invocation capability availability of this model yourself
form.supportVisionDesc: Whether it supports recognition depends entirely on the model itself. Please test the visual recognition capability availability of this model yourself
form.uploadModalIconDesc: Size must not be smaller than 128*128 pixels, formats supported are JPG/PNG, maximum 200 KB
form.uploadSizeError: Image size must not be smaller than 128*128 pixels!
form.uploadTypeError: Image must be in JPG/PNG format!
form.importJsonDesc: Upload Google service account credentials file to auto-fill the fields below
form.importJsonSuccess: Imported successfully, form has been auto-filled
form.importJsonError: Failed to parse JSON, please check the file format
form.useProxyServerDesc: Enable to use the proxy server to access the large model
form.useProxyServerPlaceholder: Please select the available proxy server
form.userInputUrlPlaceholder: Please enter the user input URL
form.vectorSizeDesc: Set the length of the vector, which determines the complexity and capacity of the model's representation of object features
form.vectorSizePlaceholder: Please enter the vector dimension, e.g., 1536, etc.

testConnectionDesc: This connectivity test will consume a small amount of Tokens for detection, please confirm the operation.
testConnectionPlaceholder: Test if the Api Key and proxy address are correctly filled in
